title: Research Briefing Generator
description: Generate a structured research briefing on any topic — covering key facts, open questions, and recommended sources.

title: Context Translator
description: Translate any text or document into English, then explain what it actually means — not just the words, but the tone, intent, and cultural nuance behind them.

title: Project Kickoff Planner
description: Define scope, milestones, and responsibilities for a new project — structured to align stakeholders from day one.

title: Meeting Notes Summariser
description: Turn raw meeting notes or transcripts into a clean summary with clearly labelled action items and owners.

title: SOP Builder
description: Turn a rough process description into a formatted standard operating procedure, ready to hand off to a team.

title: Data Interpretation Assistant
description: Describe your dataset and question — get a step-by-step analysis plan, suggested methods, and interpretation guidance.

title: Explain It Simply
description: Break down any topic, concept, or document into a plain explanation suitable for a complete newcomer — no jargon, no assumed knowledge.

title: Travel Planner
description: Plan a trip end-to-end — itinerary, logistics, budget, and packing considerations — through a guided conversation that adapts to your travel style and constraints.

title: Resume & Cover Letter Builder
description: Tailor your resume to a job description, optimise it for ATS screening, and get optional outreach materials — cover letter, email, or LinkedIn message.
